summary: Implements agent-friendly self-serve install path without requiring shell RC mutations. README updated with For Agents section. Test coverage is comprehensive with 543 lines of tests covering VAL-LAUNCH-006.

strengths: Tests thoroughly cover one-shot node dist/index.js invocation path
MORS_CONFIG_DIR isolation tested with multiple agent environments
JSON output structure validation ensures deterministic automation parsing
Error paths provide actionable remediation (init, login, etc.)
No shell RC mutation required - confirmed by explicit test

testCoverage.notes: 543 lines of tests across 23 test cases covering: self-serve invocation, full lifecycle, JSON output structure, error guidance, config isolation, documentation references
